creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
In bug 261212 comment 1 it appears that I referred to

    <https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/13>

Not so. The text that I originally wrote was, if I recall correctly: 

    'FreeBSD Ports 13.0'

Restating, with extra spacing, to avoid misinterpretation: 

    ' F r e e B S D  P o r t s  1 3 . 0 '

I can not preview this opening comment (a separate bug) …
